title: AR-11, Alien’s Change of Address Card
description: Reports a change of address to USCIS.

fields.tooltip: Information About Your Address.  Previous Physical Address.  Enter the City or Town.
fields.notes: Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.

fields.tooltip: Information About You.  Enter Middle Name (if applicable)
fields.notes: Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.

fields.tooltip: Information About You.  Enter Given Name (First Name)
fields.notes: Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.

fields.tooltip: Information About You.  Enter Family Name (Last Name).
fields.notes: Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.

fields.tooltip: Information About You.  Enter your Date of Birth. Enter the 2 digit month, 2 digit day and 4 digit year.
fields.notes: Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.

fields.tooltip: Information About Your Address.  Present Physical Address (No P O Boxes).  Enter the state.  You will be making a selection from the drop down list containing the 2 letter abbreviations of state names.
fields.notes: Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.

fields.tooltip: Information About Your Address.  Present Physical Address (No P O Boxes).  Enter the zip code.

fields.tooltip: Information About Your Address.  Present Physical Address (No P O Boxes).   Check this box if the address is an apartment.

fields.tooltip: Information About Your Address.  Present Physical Address (No P O Boxes).   If you marked the apartment, suite or floor box, enter the number here.

fields.tooltip: Information About Your Address.  Present Physical Address (No P O Boxes).  Check this box if the address is a designated floor.

fields.tooltip: Information About Your Address.  Present Physical Address (No P O Boxes).  Enter the City or Town.
fields.notes: Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.
